author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.9.0 - HAP event push is now the DEFAULT (auto-starts when paired; instant updates; 5-min keepalive + auto-reconnect; reads/writes route over the live session). Removed manual Live/Discover/Set Characteristic/Set Activity commands and the Configuration capability + poll interval (no longer needed). Leaner command set: Set Desired Temperature, Raise/Lower Setpoint, Resume Program + standard thermostat controls.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local HAP controller for ecobee thermostat: mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and all reachable configurable parameters.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
